title: Pestshield Max Strength Citronella Patches Pack of 18
features: MAX STRENGTH: Pestshield Citronella Patches offers max strength for the whole family; perfect for camping, walking, fishing, picnics and outdoor activities
LONG LASTING: Pestshield Citronella Patches last up to 7 days, offering multiple days of protection and includes 18 patches in each pack
PEEL & STICK TO CLOTHING: Pestshield Citronella Patches and an easy and simple to use product; simply peel from plastic sheet and apply to clothing for up to 7 days protection
HOW TO USE: Remove the patch from the sheet and reseal the pouch; attach to clothing
Avoid use on delicate fabrics such as silk
description: Pestshield Citronella Patches offers max strength for the whole family! Perfect for camping, walking, fishing, picnics and outdoor activities. Pestshield Citronella Patches last up to 7 days, offering multiple days of protection and includes 18 patches in each pack. Pestshield Citronella Patches and an easy and simple to use product. Simply peel from plastic sheet and apply to clothing for up to 7 days protection! Remove the patch from the sheet and reseal the pouch. Attach to clothing. Avoid use on delicate fabrics such as silk.
